headline: Cluster School Status Benefits Only 650 of 10,200 Public Schools
context: The elite cluster school designation gives extra resources to 650 schools while the remaining 9,550 receive standard allocations.

cards.big: 650 cluster schools receive RM4,200 extra per student while 9,550 schools get standard funding
cards.sub: Two-tier funding system concentrates resources in already-performing schools

cards.big: Cluster schools show 94% SPM pass rate versus 78% national average in 2025
cards.sub: Resource advantage compounds existing achievement gaps between school tiers

cards.big: 82% of cluster schools are located in urban and suburban areas with educated parent populations
cards.sub: Selection criteria favor schools with pre-existing socioeconomic advantages

cards.big: Chile's preferential school funding model directs extra resources to disadvantaged schools
cards.sub: Inverse funding allocation addresses inequality rather than reinforcing it

cards.big: Giving more resources to schools that already succeed deepens the divide it should close
Should extra education funding flow to struggling schools rather than already-performing ones
